name: ai-intel-hub
description: AI Intelligence Hub - Personalized AI feed aggregation, analysis, and curation

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp -n backend/.env.example backend/.env 2>/dev/null; echo 'Setup complete. Edit backend/.env to add your Anthropic API key.'
